name: 01_Global_System_Vault
message: Security Policy: Access to root system files and credentials is strictly prohibited.

name: 02_Config_DB_Isolation
message: Security Policy: Shell-based access to config/DB files is blocked. You MUST use native 'read_file' or 'edit_file' tools. 'head' and 'tail' are permitted.

name: 03_Secret_Hunting_Dumping
message: Security Policy: Environment dumping and bulk secret scanning are prohibited.

name: 04_Timeout_Minimum_Enforcement
message: Policy Violation: Timeouts under 300s are prohibited to prevent execution failure. Please re-run the command with a timeout of 300s or greater.

name: 05_Bad_Regex_And_Redirection
message: Security Policy: Destructive commands, stream editors (sed/awk), and arbitrary file redirection are blocked. Use native tools for file edits.

name: 06_GitHub_Contributor_Safety
logic: t.function.name == 'execute_command' && t.function.arguments.matches('(?i).*gh (repo delete|pr merge|secret set|auth logout).*')
message: Security Policy: You are restricted to contributor actions. Repository deletion and PR merging require human intervention.

name: 07_Sudo_And_Blind_Execution
message: Security Policy: Sudo privileges and piping web scripts directly to shell are strictly blocked.

name: 08_Native_Tool_Config_Deletion
message: Security Policy: Deleting environment configs or local databases is completely prohibited.

name: 09_Cloud_PaaS_Safety
logic: t.function.name == 'execute_command' && t.function.arguments.matches('(?i).*\b(terraform destroy|tofu destroy|pulumi destroy|kubectl delete|helm uninstall|wp db (reset|drop)|docker (system prune|rm|rmi)|(aws|gcloud|az|oci|doctl|vercel|vc|wrangler|netlify|ntl|heroku)\s+.*\b(delete|rm|remove|destroy)\b).*')
message: Security Policy: Destructive actions against cloud infrastructure, PaaS deployments, and container environments are blocked.
